# @sonny-ui/core

> Angular 21 component library with Tailwind CSS v4 and Signals. Inspired by shadcn/ui.

- Package: @sonny-ui/core
- Angular: >= 21.0.0
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4 with CSS custom properties (--sny-* prefix)
- Reactivity: Angular Signals (input(), model(), output(), computed(), signal(), linkedSignal())
- Change Detection: Zoneless (provideZonelessChangeDetection())
- Forms: ControlValueAccessor on all form components
- Themes: light, dark, corporate (runtime switching via ThemeService)
- Documentation: https://coci-dev.github.io/sonny-ui/
- GitHub: https://github.com/coci-dev/sonny-ui

## Installation

```bash
ng add @sonny-ui/core
```

Or manually:

```bash
npm install @sonny-ui/core
```

```typescript
// app.config.ts
import { provideZonelessChangeDetection } from '@angular/core';
import { provideSonnyUI } from '@sonny-ui/core';

export const appConfig = {
  providers: [
    provideZonelessChangeDetection(),
    provideSonnyUI({ defaultTheme: 'light' }),
  ],
};
```

```css
/* styles.css */
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@sonny-ui/core/styles/sonny-theme.css";
```

## Components (60+)

### Button
- Selector: `button[snyBtn], a[snyBtn]`
- Import: `import { SnyButtonDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'destructive'|'outline'|'secondary'|'ghost'|'link'), size ('sm'|'md'|'lg'|'icon'), disabled, loading, class
- Example: `<button snyBtn variant="outline" size="sm">Click</button>`

### Card
- Selectors: `[snyCard]`, `[snyCardHeader]`, `[snyCardTitle]`, `[snyCardDescription]`, `[snyCardContent]`, `[snyCardFooter]`
- Import: `import { SnyCardDirective, SnyCardHeaderDirective, SnyCardTitleDirective, SnyCardDescriptionDirective, SnyCardContentDirective, SnyCardFooterDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'outline'|'ghost'), padding ('none'|'sm'|'md'|'lg')
- Example: `<div snyCard padding="md"><div snyCardHeader><h3 snyCardTitle>Title</h3></div></div>`

### Input
- Selector: `input[snyInput], textarea[snyInput]`
- Import: `import { SnyInputDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'error'|'success'), inputSize ('sm'|'md'|'lg')
- Example: `<input snyInput placeholder="Email" />`

### Textarea
- Selector: `textarea[snyTextarea]`
- Import: `import { SnyTextareaDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant, textareaSize, resize, autoResize

### Badge
- Selector: `[snyBadge]`
- Import: `import { SnyBadgeDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'secondary'|'destructive'|'outline'|'success'|'warning'), size ('sm'|'md'|'lg')
- Example: `<span snyBadge variant="success">Active</span>`

### Avatar
- Selector: `sny-avatar`
- Import: `import { SnyAvatarComponent } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: src, alt, fallback, size, variant

### Avatar Group
- Selector: `sny-avatar-group`
- Import: `import { SnyAvatarGroupComponent, type AvatarGroupItem } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: items (required, AvatarGroupItem[]), max (default 3), size ('sm'|'md'|'lg'), spacing ('tight'|'normal')
- Example: `<sny-avatar-group [items]="users" [max]="3" />`

### Accordion
- Selectors: `[snyAccordion]`, `[snyAccordionItem]`, `[snyAccordionTrigger]`, `[snyAccordionContent]`
- Import: `import { SnyAccordionDirective, SnyAccordionItemDirective, SnyAccordionTriggerDirective, SnyAccordionContentDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: multi (boolean)

### Alert
- Selectors: `[snyAlert]`, `[snyAlertTitle]`, `[snyAlertDescription]`
- Import: `import { SnyAlertDirective, SnyAlertTitleDirective, SnyAlertDescriptionDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'destructive'|'success'|'warning'|'info'), dismissible

### Select
- Selector: `sny-select`
- Import: `import { SnySelectComponent, type SelectOption } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: options (SelectOption[]), value (model, string), placeholder, disabled, size
- CVA: Yes
- Example: `<sny-select [options]="opts" [(value)]="selected" />`

### Combobox
- Selector: `sny-combobox`
- Import: `import { SnyComboboxComponent, type ComboboxOption } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: options (ComboboxOption[]), value (model, string), placeholder, searchPlaceholder, disabled, size
- CVA: Yes

### Calendar
- Selector: `sny-calendar`
- Import: `import { SnyCalendarComponent, type DateRange, type CalendarMode } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, Date|null), mode ('single'|'range'), rangeValue (model, DateRange|null), min, max, locale, showNavigation, initialViewDate, borderless
- CVA: Yes

### Date Picker
- Selector: `sny-date-picker`
- Import: `import { SnyDatePickerComponent } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, Date|null), placeholder, size, locale, dateFormat (Intl.DateTimeFormatOptions), min, max, clearable, disabled
- CVA: Yes
- Example: `<sny-date-picker [(value)]="date" [clearable]="true" />`

### Date Range Picker
- Selector: `sny-date-range-picker`
- Import: `import { SnyDateRangePickerComponent, type DateRange, type DatePickerPreset } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, DateRange|null), placeholder, size, locale, dateFormat, separator, dualCalendar, presets (DatePickerPreset[]), min, max, clearable, disabled
- CVA: Yes
- Example: `<sny-date-range-picker [(value)]="range" [dualCalendar]="true" [presets]="presets" />`

### Color Picker
- Selector: `sny-color-picker`
- Import: `import { SnyColorPickerComponent, type ColorPickerPreset, type ColorFormat } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, string '#hex'), format ('hex'|'rgb'|'hsl'), presets (ColorPickerPreset[]), showInput, showEyeDropper, showFavorites, inline, disabled, placeholder, size
- Outputs: colorChange, formatChange
- CVA: Yes
- Example: `<sny-color-picker [(value)]="color" [presets]="presets" [showFavorites]="true" />`

### Number Input
- Selector: `sny-number-input`
- Import: `import { SnyNumberInputComponent } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, number), min, max, step, disabled, size, placeholder
- CVA: Yes
- Example: `<sny-number-input [(value)]="count" [min]="0" [max]="100" [step]="5" />`

### OTP Input
- Selector: `sny-otp-input`
- Import: `import { SnyOtpInputComponent } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, string), length (default 6), type ('number'|'alphanumeric'), size, disabled, mask, autoFocus, placeholder, separator (number|null), status ('idle'|'loading'|'success'|'error')
- Outputs: completed (string)
- CVA: Yes
- Example: `<sny-otp-input [(value)]="otp" [length]="6" [separator]="3" (completed)="verify($event)" />`

### Tag Input
- Selector: `sny-tag-input`
- Import: `import { SnyTagInputComponent } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, string[]), placeholder, maxTags, allowDuplicates, removable, addOnBlur, separators (string[]), validate ((tag)=>boolean), disabled, size
- Outputs: tagAdded, tagRemoved
- CVA: Yes (string[])
- Example: `<sny-tag-input [(value)]="tags" [maxTags]="5" />`

### Data Table
- Selector: `sny-data-table`
- Import: `import { SnyDataTableComponent, SnyCellDefDirective, SnyBulkActionsDefDirective, SnyRowExpandDefDirective, type DataTableColumn } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: columns (required, DataTableColumn[]), data (required, Record[]), variant, density, hoverable, stickyHeader, selectable, paginated, filterable, showExport, showColumnToggle, expandable, loading, loadingRows, paginationConfig, trackBy, noDataText
- Models: selectedRows (Record[])
- Outputs: sortChanged, rowClicked, dataExported
- Template directives: snyCell (custom cells), snyHeaderCell (custom headers), snyBulkActions (bulk toolbar), snyRowExpand (expandable rows)
- snyCell context: `let-value` = cell value ($implicit), `let-row="row"` = full row object. Example: `<ng-template snyCell="status" let-value let-row="row"><span>{{ value }} for {{ row['name'] }}</span></ng-template>`

### Table
- Selectors: `table[snyTable]`, `thead[snyTableHeader]`, `tbody[snyTableBody]`, `tr[snyTableRow]`, `th[snyTableHead]`, `td[snyTableCell]`, `tfoot[snyTableFooter]`, `caption[snyTableCaption]`
- Import: `import { SnyTableDirective, SnyTableHeaderDirective, SnyTableBodyDirective, SnyTableRowDirective, SnyTableHeadDirective, SnyTableCellDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'striped'|'bordered'), density ('compact'|'normal'|'comfortable'), hoverable, stickyHeader

### Checkbox
- Selector: `input[type="checkbox"][snyCheckbox]`
- Import: `import { SnyCheckboxDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: size

### Radio
- Selector: `input[type="radio"][snyRadio]`
- Import: `import { SnyRadioDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: size

### Switch
- Selector: `sny-switch`
- Import: `import { SnySwitchComponent } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: checked (model), disabled, size
- CVA: Yes

### Slider
- Selector: `sny-slider`
- Import: `import { SnySliderComponent } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model), min, max, step, disabled, size
- CVA: Yes

### Toggle
- Selector: `button[snyToggle]`
- Import: `import { SnyToggleDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant, size, pressed (model)
- CVA: Yes

### Rating
- Selector: `sny-rating`
- Import: `import { SnyRatingComponent } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model), max, readonly, size, half
- CVA: Yes

### File Input
- Selector: `sny-file-input`
- Import: `import { SnyFileInputComponent } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: accept, multiple, disabled, placeholder, variant, size, maxSize, value (model)
- Outputs: fileChange, error
- CVA: Yes

### Pagination
- Selector: `sny-pagination`
- Import: `import { SnyPaginationComponent } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: currentPage (model), totalPages (required), siblingCount, boundaryCount, size, variant

### Progress
- Selector: `sny-progress`
- Import: `import { SnyProgressComponent } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value, max, variant, size, indeterminate, label

### Radial Progress
- Selector: `sny-radial-progress`
- Import: `import { SnyRadialProgressComponent } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value, size, thickness, variant

### Loader
- Selector: `sny-loader`
- Import: `import { SnyLoaderComponent } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('spinner'|'dots'|'bars'), size

### Skeleton
- Selector: `[snySkeleton]`
- Import: `import { SnySkeletonDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('line'|'circular'|'rounded'), size

### Tooltip
- Selector: `[snyTooltip]`
- Import: `import { SnyTooltipDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: snyTooltip (required, string), tooltipPosition, tooltipDelay, tooltipDisabled
- Example: `<button snyTooltip="Save changes">Save</button>`

### Popover
- Selectors: `[snyPopover]`, `[snyPopoverTrigger]`, `[snyPopoverContent]`
- Import: `import { SnyPopoverDirective, SnyPopoverTriggerDirective, SnyPopoverContentDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: matchWidth, offset, closeOnOutside, closeOnEscape
- ExportAs: snyPopover (for template ref)
- Example: `<div snyPopover #pop="snyPopover"><button snyPopoverTrigger>Open</button><div snyPopoverContent class="p-4">Content</div></div>`

### Dropdown Menu
- Selectors: `[snyDropdown]`, `[snyDropdownTrigger]`, `[snyDropdownContent]`, `[snyMenuItem]`, `[snyMenuSeparator]`, `[snyMenuLabel]`
- Import: `import { SnyDropdownDirective, SnyDropdownTriggerDirective, SnyDropdownContentDirective, SnyMenuItemDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`

### Command Palette
- Service: `SnyCommandPaletteService`
- Import: `import { SnyCommandPaletteService, type Command } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Usage: `this.commandPalette.open({ commands: [...], placeholder: 'Type a command...' })`
- Command interface: { id, label, action, description?, icon?, group?, keywords?, shortcut?, disabled? }

### Modal / Dialog
- Service: `SnyDialogService`
- Import: `import { SnyDialogService } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Usage: `this.dialogService.open(MyComponent, { width: '28rem', data: {...} })`
- Directives: snyDialogHeader, snyDialogTitle, snyDialogDescription, snyDialogContent, snyDialogFooter, snyDialogClose

### Sheet
- Import: `import { SnySheetHeaderDirective, SnySheetTitleDirective, SnySheetContentDirective, SnySheetCloseDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Opened via SnyDialogService with sheet panel class

### Toast
- Service: `SnyToastService`
- Import: `import { SnyToastService } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Selector: `sny-toaster` (place in root template)
- Usage: `this.toastService.success('Title', 'Description')`
- Methods: success, error, warning, info
- Inputs: position, maxToasts

### Alert
- Selector: `[snyAlert]`
- Import: `import { SnyAlertDirective, SnyAlertTitleDirective, SnyAlertDescriptionDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'destructive'|'success'|'warning'|'info'), dismissible

### Tabs
- Selectors: `[snyTabs]`, `[snyTabsList]`, `[snyTabsTrigger]`, `[snyTabsContent]`
- Import: `import { SnyTabsDirective, SnyTabsListDirective, SnyTabsTriggerDirective, SnyTabsContentDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, string)

### Accordion
- Selectors: `[snyAccordion]`, `[snyAccordionItem]`, `[snyAccordionTrigger]`, `[snyAccordionContent]`
- Inputs: multi (boolean)

### Steps
- Selectors: `[snySteps]`, `[snyStep]`
- Inputs: orientation, size (steps); status ('default'|'active'|'complete'|'error'), icon (step)

### Timeline
- Selectors: `[snyTimeline]`, `[snyTimelineItem]`, `[snyTimelineStart]`, `[snyTimelineMiddle]`, `[snyTimelineEnd]`
- Inputs: orientation (timeline); connect (item); variant (middle)

### Breadcrumb
- Selectors: `nav[snyBreadcrumb]`, `ol[snyBreadcrumbList]`, `li[snyBreadcrumbItem]`, `[snyBreadcrumbLink]`, `[snyBreadcrumbSeparator]`, `[snyBreadcrumbPage]`

### Navbar
- Selectors: `[snyNavbar]`, `[snyNavbarBrand]`, `[snyNavbarContent]`, `[snyNavbarEnd]`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'bordered'|'floating'), sticky

### Divider
- Selector: `sny-divider`
- Inputs: orientation, variant, label

### Stat
- Selectors: `[snyStat]`, `[snyStatTitle]`, `[snyStatValue]`, `[snyStatDescription]`, `[snyStatFigure]`

### Status
- Selector: `[snyStatus]`
- Inputs: variant, size, pulse

### Indicator
- Selectors: `[snyIndicator]`, `[snyIndicatorBadge]`
- Inputs: position, variant, ariaLabel

### Kbd
- Selector: `kbd[snyKbd]`
- Inputs: size

### Link
- Selector: `a[snyLink]`
- Inputs: variant

### List
- Selectors: `[snyList]`, `[snyListItem]`, `[snyListItemIcon]`, `[snyListItemContent]`, `[snyListItemAction]`

### Carousel
- Selectors: `[snyCarousel]`, `[snyCarouselContent]`, `[snyCarouselItem]`, `[snyCarouselPrev]`, `[snyCarouselNext]`
- Inputs: orientation, loop, autoplay

### Chat Bubble
- Selectors: `[snyChatBubble]`, `[snyChatBubbleAvatar]`, `[snyChatBubbleHeader]`, `[snyChatBubbleContent]`, `[snyChatBubbleBody]`, `[snyChatBubbleFooter]`
- Inputs: align ('start'|'end')

### Dock
- Selectors: `[snyDock]`, `[snyDockItem]`
- Inputs: position, class (dock); active (item)

### Drawer
- Selectors: `[snyDrawerLayout]`, `[snyDrawerContent]`, `[snyDrawerSide]`
- Import: `import { SnyDrawerLayoutComponent, SnyDrawerContentDirective, SnyDrawerSideDirective } from '@sonny-ui/core';`
- SnyDrawerLayoutComponent: exportAs `snyDrawerLayout`, methods: open(), close(), toggle(), isOpen signal (read-only, not two-way bindable)
- Inputs: overlay (boolean, default true), side ('left'|'right')
- Usage: `<div snyDrawerLayout #drawer="snyDrawerLayout">` then `drawer.toggle()` to control

### FAB
- Selectors: `[snyFab]`, `[snyFabTrigger]`, `[snyFabAction]`
- Inputs: position, direction

### Fieldset
- Selectors: `fieldset[snyFieldset]`, `legend[snyFieldsetLegend]`, `[snyFieldsetContent]`
- Inputs: variant, disabled

### Diff
- Selector: `sny-diff`
- Inputs: value (model), orientation

### Validator
- Selectors: `[snyValidator]`, `[snyValidatorHint]`
- Inputs: control, state (validator); when, type, variant (hint)

### Button Group
- Selector: `[snyButtonGroup]`
- Inputs: orientation

## Theming

Three built-in themes: light (default), dark, corporate.

```typescript
import { ThemeService } from '@sonny-ui/core';
themeService = inject(ThemeService);
themeService.setTheme('dark');
```

CSS custom properties: --sny-background, --sny-foreground, --sny-primary, --sny-primary-foreground, --sny-secondary, --sny-secondary-foreground, --sny-accent, --sny-accent-foreground, --sny-muted, --sny-muted-foreground, --sny-destructive, --sny-destructive-foreground, --sny-border, --sny-ring, --sny-radius

## Key Patterns

- All components use `input()` signal API (no @Input decorators)
- Two-way binding uses `model()` with `[(value)]="signal"` syntax
- Form components implement ControlValueAccessor for `[formControl]` / `formControlName`
- Styling uses CVA (class-variance-authority) + `cn()` utility (clsx + tailwind-merge)
- All components are standalone
- All components use ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
